subject: Re: LSJ Utility Building Electric budget/ quote from Glidden
body:
Doug, 
At yesterdays meeting you properly questioned the amount  of reduction in 
cost to the proposed Electric Budget as  to; 
1-Attributed to reduction in bid by Glidden   
    *   Glidden’s original bid dated 5/13/08 was in the amount  of 
$1,080,000.00 
    *   Glidden’s revised bid dated 6/12/08 for a similar scope  of work is 
$841,038.00 
    *   Reduction in budget for a similar scope of work as a  result of 
revised reduced bid appears to be $238,907.00  
2-The reduction in budget for Utility building  attributable to transferring 
from the original Glidden scope to a site  distribution budget, power 
distribution from the building,   
    *   Utility building switchboard to Kitchen panel=                        
      $158,760.00 
    *   Utility building switchboard to Engineering “MDF”=  $50,582.00 
    *   Utility building switchboard to Transfer switch 3  =        
$34,904.00 
    *   Transferred from Utility Building budget to a  site power 
distribution budget is the  amount of  $244,246  
Additionally we had quoted from  Glidden; 
    *   Providing power from the proposed  Utility  Building switchboard to  
the Wood shop manhole- Bid amount $13,743.00 
    *   Providing power from the Kitchen  panel to the New Office Structure 
$42,932.00 
The above costs by Glidden are  exclusive of excavation, backfill, concrete 
work, concrete  patching. 
I am expecting a revised bid from  R&A and will forward it to you upon 
receipt. 
Upon review of their bid last week  it appeared they had included the entire 
Utility Building lighting and outlets columns 1-14  and had asked for time to 
review with their estimator and correct as  necessary. 
If you have any questions please  call. 
Charles

body_html:
Doug,

 

At yesterdays meeting you properly questioned the amount of reduction in cost to the proposed Electric Budget as to;

 

1-Attributed to reduction in bid by Glidden

  • Glidden’s original bid dated 5/13/08 was in the amount of $1,080,000.00
  • Glidden’s revised bid dated 6/12/08 for a similar scope of work is $841,038.00
  • Reduction in budget for a similar scope of work as a result of revised reduced bid appears to be $238,907.00

2-The reduction in budget for Utility building attributable to transferring from the original Glidden scope to a site distribution budget, power distribution from the building, 

  • Utility building switchboard to Kitchen panel=                             $158,760.00
  • Utility building switchboard to Engineering “MDF”=  $50,582.00
  • Utility building switchboard to Transfer switch 3 =       $34,904.00
  • Transferred from Utility Building budget to a  site power distribution budget is the amount of  $244,246  

 Additionally we had quoted from Glidden;

  • Providing power from the proposed Utility Building switchboard to the Wood shop manhole- Bid amount $13,743.00
  • Providing power from the Kitchen panel to the New Office Structure $42,932.00 

The above costs by Glidden are exclusive of excavation, backfill, concrete work, concrete patching.

 

I am expecting a revised bid from R&A and will forward it to you upon receipt.

Upon review of their bid last week it appeared they had included the entire Utility Building lighting and outlets columns 1-14 and had asked for time to review with their estimator and correct as necessary.

 

If you have any questions please call.

 

Charles
